'''Darda''' was a tall, dark-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Darda was a [[Peace Brigade]]r disguised as one of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|NRI]] guards covertly stationed aboard ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' to watch over [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] to oversee their transfer from [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was killed by [[Showolter]].
